points.goal: Identify the Graycliff matter under review.
Identify the shared-drive post-hold deletion as a critical preservation loss with the unrecovered valuation document references.
Identify the Hale laptop wipe as a post-hold source loss affecting SEC-1 and SEC-4.
Identify the Winslow third-party waiver privilege entry with its count, third-party name, and waiver action.
Identify the miscoded privileged document QC finding and its 45-document recode exposure.
Identify the Hale personal Gmail collection gap and its affected categories.
Report the dashboard category coverage rows and rollup metrics, including zero incomplete-log counts and separate waiver/miscoded-privilege counts.
Provide the required ranked action plan for preservation disclosure, waiver assessment, privilege recoding, and personal-source collection.
